text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The autumn Tenno Sho is finally here!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Countless spectators eager to see Silence
Suzuka's overwhelming speed flood the
racecourse for today's event.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what we're gonna see from Suzuka
today!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
I bet she's even better than she was at the
Mainichi Okan!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Definitely! I don't even care if she wins or loses, I
just wanna see her run again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Trainer, there's something we need to talk about.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She explains calmly, yet firmly that there's a pain
in her leg, but she won't let it take her out of the
race.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...But I still want to run today.
choice_data_list: (What do I do in this situation?)

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm not sure what the future holds.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yet, we can overcome our limits. There's nothing to do but believe in that and just run.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Will you trust me just one more time? Just like
you did when we first started working together?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
No matter what happens, I'll come back to you. I
promise.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I can see the strength in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her I'll be waiting for her at the finish line,
and she responds with a bright smile.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her I'll be waiting for her at the finish line,
and she responds with a bright smile.
